hooks.command: [ -f package.json ] || exit 0; npm run lint 2>&1 && npm run build 2>&1 && npm run test 2>&1

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'rm[[:space:]]+-rf|git[[:space:]]+push[[:space:]]+--force|git[[:space:]]+reset[[:space:]]+--hard|DROP[[:space:]]+TABLE'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 위험한 명령어가 감지되었습니다.' >&2; exit 2; fi
